query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, gameTime, published, awaySpread, homeSpread, awayML, homeML, total, awayScore, homeScore, status FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-26' AND sport = 'MLB' ORDER BY gameTime ASC;
